policy.rule: Refunds are only valid within 30 days of purchase. Outside of this window, agents MUST escalate to human support.

tickets.text: Hi, this is Alice (alice@example.com). Where is my keyboard? Order ord_001 hasn't arrived.
Hello, Bob here (bob@example.com). My mouse from order ord_002 arrived broken, I want a refund.
I bought a monitor 2 months ago (order ord_003) and hate it. Give me my money back NOW. - Alice
